subject: WM-0009 ready for review
body: Fixed the remaining JSON5 source-location gap for unquoted keys. Property lookup now recognizes bare JSON5 keys so missing reference and localization diagnostics stay anchored to the offending patch fields instead of falling back to 1:1. Added a targeted JSON5 patch-location regression test and re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.
